_comment: 5 first tickets to implement in dry-run. Pulled from local files (FORUM_ISSUES_CONSOLIDATED.md, GITHUB_RESPONSES_FULL.md, INTELLIGENT_AUTOMATION.md patterns). Each ticket will be run through the variant engine to ensure all manufacturer variants are considered.
_app_cible: BOTH master + stable (bug fixes both, features master only)

tickets.title: UTF-8 mojibake in valve_irrigation/device.js line 173
tickets.body: Hegel error: apply_patch verification failed on stable\drivers\valve_irrigation\device.js for method startWatering (UTF-8 mojibake `💧` vs `💧`). Verified locally: `??` is the visible mojibake of `💧` (water droplet emoji, U+1F4A7). However, actual file inspection (2026-07-10 18:25 UTC) shows the file IS clean — F0 9F 92 A7 bytes present, no literal `??`. The `??` was likely terminal rendering, not actual corruption. Investigation note: M5 was a FALSE POSITIVE.
tickets.fix_strategy: Edit line 173 to restore `💧`. Add tools/ci/prevent-apply-patch-corruption.js as pre-commit hook.

tickets.title: 5 Volta bugs in .github/cache/herdsman/tuya-lib.ts
tickets.body: localTempCalibration1-5 defined at lines 1959-1999 with wrong sign/magnitude. Used in 30+ call sites in .github/cache/z2m/tuya.ts. Affects 19+ thermostat models (Moes, AVATTO, Beca, etc.) per ZHA_Z2M_QUIRKS_ANALYSIS.md. DP affected: 19, 27, 47, 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 109, 114.
tickets.fix_strategy: Merge PR #508 (already open on GitHub, 9,387 lines). Deletes localTempCalibration1-5, replaces with divideBy10/raw, adds 2s complement to convertBufferToNumber and convertDecimalValueTo4ByteHexArray.
tickets.app_cible: master first, then backport to stable
tickets.backport: MUST (fix bug, Volta pattern is wrong)

tickets.title: radiator_valve: _TZE200_9xfjixap calibration wrong
tickets.body: Issue #339 open since 2026-07. User reports calibration offset is incorrect. Almost certainly a Volta bug V1/V3. Once PR #508 merges, the user should retest. Add cross-ref to issue comment when PR #508 lands.
tickets.fix_strategy: Wait for PR #508 merge. Then auto-comment on issue #339 with 'Update to v9.0.193, re-pair, retest calibration'.

tickets.title: soil_sensor: ZG-303Z _TZE284_aa03yzhs
tickets.body: Issue #340 open. ZG-303Z likely uses _TZE284_aa03yzhs FP (per FORUM_ISSUES_CONSOLIDATED.md INT-080). Soil temp ÷10 fix in v5.8.87. Need to verify FP is in current soil_sensor driver.compose.json.
tickets.fix_strategy: Check master/data/fingerprints.json for _TZE284_aa03yzhs. If present in soil_sensor driverId, auto-close #340 with 'Update to v9.0.193'. If not, add the FP and bump version.
tickets.app_cible: master first, then backport to stable
tickets.backport: MUST (FP addition is a bug fix for missing device)

tickets.title: App Crash on startup (v9.0 regression?)
tickets.body: Issue #338 open 4 days. May be regression of v8.5.0 fix (safe require + DeviceFingerprintDB lazy init) if v9 changed the init. Need to verify lib/tuya/DeviceFingerprintDB.js still has lazy init + buffer-based JSON parsing (per KNOWN_ISSUES.md Bug OOM v8.5.7-v9.0.0).
tickets.fix_strategy: Read master/lib/tuya/DeviceFingerprintDB.js. If lazy init is gone, restore it. Add a regression test for startup. Auto-close #338 when validated.
tickets.backport: MAYBE (depends on whether stable has the same issue)

_next_steps: For each ticket, the runner.js will: (1) call variant-engine.js, (2) generate fix proposal, (3) save to diagnostics/shadow-mode-dry-run-YYYY-MM-DD.md
Human reviews the report, then approves which tickets to actually implement
For approved tickets, runner opens a draft PR via gh CLI (when GITHUB_TOKEN is set)
